Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Represents a recorded training activity, such as a bike ride, run, or swim.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Activity entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed this activity. (Relationship: User 1:N Activity)

activityDate.description: The date and time when the activity took place.

distanceKm.description: Total distance covered during the activity in kilometers.

durationMinutes.description: Total duration of the activity in minutes.

elevationGainMeters.description: Total elevation gained during the activity in meters.

averagePowerWatts.description: Average power output during the activity in watts, if recorded.

normalizedPowerWatts.description: Normalized power output during the activity in watts, if recorded.

averageHeartRateBpm.description: Average heart rate during the activity in beats per minute, if recorded.

tss.description: Training Stress Score for the activity, if calculated.

rpe.description: Rate of Perceived Exertion for the activity (scale 1-10).

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the activity.

gpxFileUrl.description: URL to the GPX file associated with this activity, if imported.

fitFileUrl.description: URL to the FIT file associated with this activity, if imported.

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike used for this activity. (Relationship: Bike 1:N Activity)

TrainingPlan.title: TrainingPlan
TrainingPlan.description: Defines an overarching training plan with specific goals and a duration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingPlan entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this training plan. (Relationship: User 1:N TrainingPlan)

name.description: The name of the training plan.

description.description: A detailed description of the training plan.

startDate.description: The start date of the training plan.

endDate.description: The end date of the training plan.

status.description: The current status of the training plan (e.g., 'Active', 'Completed', 'Draft', 'Archived').

targetTSS.description: The target total Training Stress Score for the entire plan.

TrainingSession.title: TrainingSession
TrainingSession.description: Represents a specific, scheduled training session within a larger training plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingSession entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this training session. (Relationship: User 1:N TrainingSession)

trainingPlanId.description: Reference to the TrainingPlan this session belongs to. (Relationship: TrainingPlan 1:N TrainingSession)

name.description: The name of the training session.

description.description: A detailed description of the training session.

scheduledDate.description: The scheduled date for this training session.

durationTargetMinutes.description: The target duration for this session in minutes.

tssTarget.description: The target Training Stress Score for this session.

isCompleted.description: Indicates if the training session has been completed.

activityId.description: Reference to the actual Activity recorded for this session if completed. (Relationship: Activity 1:1 TrainingSession)

notes.description: Additional notes about the training session.

Bike.title: Bike
Bike.description: Represents an individual bicycle owned by the user, serving as an inventory item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bike entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this bike. (Relationship: User 1:N Bike)

name.description: A user-friendly name for the bike (e.g., 'Road Bike', 'MTB').

weightKg.description: The weight of the bike in kilograms.

priceEuros.description: The purchase price of the bike in Euros.

purchaseDate.description: The date when the bike was purchased.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the bike.

totalKilometers.description: The total kilometers accumulated on this bike. (Calculated field, initialized to 0)

Component.title: Component
Component.description: Details individual parts of a bicycle, allowing for tracking of mileage and maintenance needs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Component entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this component. (Relationship: User 1:N Component)

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike this component is installed on. (Relationship: Bike 1:N Component)

name.description: A descriptive name for the component (e.g., 'Chain', 'Front Tire', 'Cassette').

purchaseDate.description: The date when the component was purchased.

priceEuros.description: The purchase price of the component in Euros.

weightGrams.description: The weight of the component in grams.

estimatedLifeKm.description: The estimated lifespan of the component in kilometers.

estimatedLifeHours.description: The estimated lifespan of the component in hours.

installationDate.description: The date when the component was installed.

currentKm.description: The current kilometers accumulated on this component since installation or last reset. (Calculated field, initialized to 0)

currentHours.description: The current hours accumulated on this component since installation or last reset. (Calculated field, initialized to 0)

alertThresholdKm.description: The kilometer threshold at which an wear alert should be triggered for this component.

alertThresholdHours.description: The hour threshold at which an wear alert should be triggered for this component.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the component.

MaintenanceRecord.title: MaintenanceRecord
MaintenanceRecord.description: Logs a specific maintenance event performed on a bike or a component.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceRecord entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this maintenance. (Relationship: User 1:N MaintenanceRecord)

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike on which maintenance was performed. (Relationship: Bike 1:N MaintenanceRecord)

componentId.description: Reference to the Component on which maintenance was performed. (Relationship: Component 1:N MaintenanceRecord)

date.description: The date and time when the maintenance was performed.

description.description: A description of the maintenance performed (e.g., 'Chain cleaning', 'Tire replacement', 'Full service').

costEuros.description: The cost of the maintenance in Euros.

odometerReadingKm.description: The bike's total mileage in kilometers at the time of maintenance.

Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Stores details for a cooking recipe, including ingredients, instructions, and metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recipe entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created or saved this recipe. (Relationship: User 1:N Recipe)

description.description: A brief description of the recipe.

prepTimeMinutes.description: The estimated preparation time for the recipe in minutes.

cookTimeMinutes.description: The estimated cooking time for the recipe in minutes.

servings.description: The number of servings the recipe yields.

instructions.description: An ordered list of instructions for preparing the recipe.

notes.description: Additional notes or tips for the recipe.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the prepared dish.

rating.description: A personal rating for the recipe (e.g., 1-5 stars).

isFavorite.description: Indicates if the recipe is marked as a favorite.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the recipe was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the recipe was last updated.

tagIds.description: References to Tags associated with this recipe. (Relationship: Tag N:N Recipe)

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Generic tag for categorizing various items across the application, like recipes or tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this tag. Can be null for system-wide tags. (Relationship: User 1:N Tag)

name.description: The name of the tag (e.g., 'Vegan', 'High Protein', 'Weeknight Meal').

category.description: A category for the tag (e.g., 'Cuisine Type', 'Dietary Preference', 'Macro Focus', 'Technique').

Ingredient.title: Ingredient
Ingredient.description: Represents a general food ingredient, used for recipe definitions and pantry management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ingredient entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who defined this ingredient. Can be null for common system ingredients. (Relationship: User 1:N Ingredient)

name.description: The common name of the ingredient (e.g., 'Flour', 'Sugar', 'Chicken Breast').

description.description: A detailed description or notes about the ingredient.

defaultUnitOfMeasure.description: The default unit of measure for this ingredient (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'unit', 'cup').

barcode.description: The EAN/UPC barcode of the ingredient, if available.

RecipeIngredient.title: RecipeIngredient
RecipeIngredient.description: Links an ingredient to a specific recipe, specifying the quantity and preparation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RecipeIngredient entity.

recipeId.description: Reference to the Recipe this ingredient belongs to. (Relationship: Recipe 1:N RecipeIngredient)

ingredientId.description: Reference to the Ingredient used in the recipe. (Relationship: Ingredient 1:N RecipeIngredient)

quantity.description: The quantity of the ingredient required for the recipe.

unit.description: The specific unit of measure for this ingredient in the context of the recipe (e.g., 'tbsp', 'cup', 'g', 'medium').

notes.description: Specific preparation notes for this ingredient in the recipe (e.g., 'finely chopped', 'diced').

CyclingClothingItem.title: CyclingClothingItem
CyclingClothingItem.description: An inventory item for cycling apparel, used by the weather assistant for recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CyclingClothingItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this clothing item. (Relationship: User 1:N CyclingClothingItem)

name.description: The name of the clothing item (e.g., 'Castelli Thermal Jersey', 'Rapha Wind Vest').

type.description: The type of clothing item (e.g., 'Jersey', 'Jacket', 'Base Layer', 'Bibs', 'Gloves', 'Socks', 'Helmet').

brand.description: The brand of the clothing item.

model.description: The model of the clothing item.

description.description: A detailed description of the clothing item.

minTempCelsius.description: The minimum recommended temperature in Celsius for this item.

maxTempCelsius.description: The maximum recommended temperature in Celsius for this item.

isWindproof.description: Indicates if the item is windproof.

isWaterproof.description: Indicates if the item is waterproof.

layerType.description: The type of layer this item represents (e.g., 'Base', 'Mid', 'Outer', 'Accessory').

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the clothing item.

TirePressureSetup.title: TirePressureSetup
TirePressureSetup.description: Stores user-defined or recommended tire pressure settings for different bikes and conditions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TirePressureSetup entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this tire pressure setup. (Relationship: User 1:N TirePressureSetup)

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike this setup is associated with. (Relationship: Bike 1:N TirePressureSetup)

name.description: A descriptive name for the tire pressure setup (e.g., 'Road Race Setup', 'Gravel Commute').

riderWeightKg.description: The rider's weight in kilograms used for the calculation.

bikeWeightKg.description: The bike's weight in kilograms used for the calculation.

tireWidthMm.description: The width of the tire in millimeters.

terrainType.description: The type of terrain for which the pressure is optimized (e.g., 'smooth_road', 'cobbles', 'light_gravel', 'heavy_gravel', 'mixed').

weatherCondition.description: The weather conditions for which the pressure is optimized (e.g., 'dry', 'wet', 'mixed').

recommendedFrontPressureBar.description: The recommended front tire pressure in bar.

recommendedRearPressureBar.description: The recommended rear tire pressure in bar.

notes.description: Additional notes about this tire pressure setup.

Plant.title: Plant
Plant.description: Represents an indoor plant, including its care schedule and health status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plant entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this plant. (Relationship: User 1:N Plant)

species.description: The botanical species name of the plant.

nickname.description: A personal nickname for the plant.

location.description: The physical location of the plant in the user's home (e.g., 'Living Room', 'Kitchen Window').

acquisitionDate.description: The date when the plant was acquired.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the plant.

notes.description: Additional notes about the plant or its care.

wateringFrequencyDays.description: The frequency of watering for the plant in days (e.g., 7 for weekly).

lastWateringDate.description: The date of the last watering action.

healthStatus.description: A simple visual indicator of the plant's health (e.g., 'green', 'yellow', 'red').

PlantAction.title: PlantAction
PlantAction.description: Logs specific actions performed on a plant, such as watering, repotting, or fertilizing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlantAction entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed this action. (Relationship: User 1:N PlantAction)

plantId.description: Reference to the Plant on which the action was performed. (Relationship: Plant 1:N PlantAction)

actionDate.description: The date and time when the action was performed.

PantryItem.title: PantryItem
PantryItem.description: Tracks individual items currently in the user's pantry, fridge, or freezer, with quantities and expiration dates.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PantryItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this pantry item. (Relationship: User 1:N PantryItem)

ingredientId.description: Reference to the generic Ingredient definition, if applicable. (Relationship: Ingredient 1:N PantryItem)

customName.description: Custom name for the item if it's not linked to a generic ingredient.

location.description: The storage location of the item (e.g., 'fridge', 'freezer', 'cupboard', 'spices', 'other').

quantity.description: The quantity of the item in stock.

unit.description: The unit of measure for the quantity (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'unit', 'pack').

expirationDate.description: The expiration date of the item.

barcode.description: The scanned barcode of the item, if available.

notes.description: Additional notes about the pantry item.

addedDate.description: The date and time when the item was added to the pantry.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The date and time when the item's details were last updated.

ShoppingListItem.title: ShoppingListItem
ShoppingListItem.description: Represents an item on the user's shopping list.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ShoppingListItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this shopping list item. (Relationship: User 1:N ShoppingListItem)

ingredientId.description: Reference to the generic Ingredient definition, if applicable. (Relationship: Ingredient 1:N ShoppingListItem)

customName.description: Custom name for the item if it's not linked to a generic ingredient.

quantity.description: The desired quantity of the item to purchase.

unit.description: The unit of measure for the desired quantity (e.g., 'g', 'ml', 'pack').

isPurchased.description: Indicates if the item has been purchased.

addedDate.description: The date and time when the item was added to the shopping list.

notes.description: Additional notes about the shopping list item.

ExpenseCategory.title: ExpenseCategory
ExpenseCategory.description: Defines a category for tracking expenses and budgets.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpenseCategory entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this expense category. (Relationship: User 1:N ExpenseCategory)

name.description: The name of the expense category (e.g., 'Groceries', 'Bike Gear', 'Utilities').

icon.description: Name or identifier for an icon representing the category.

MonthlyBudget.title: MonthlyBudget
MonthlyBudget.description: Sets a monthly financial budget, associating allocated amounts to specific expense categories.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MonthlyBudget entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this monthly budget. (Relationship: User 1:N MonthlyBudget)

monthYear.description: The month and year for which the budget applies (format YYYY-MM, e.g., '2023-11').

totalIncomeEuros.description: The total income for the budgeted month in Euros.

totalBudgetedAmountEuros.description: The sum of all allocated amounts for this month across all categories in Euros.

BudgetAllocation.title: BudgetAllocation
BudgetAllocation.description: Specifies the budgeted amount for a particular expense category within a given month.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BudgetAllocation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this budget allocation. (Relationship: User 1:N BudgetAllocation)

monthlyBudgetId.description: Reference to the MonthlyBudget this allocation belongs to. (Relationship: MonthlyBudget 1:N BudgetAllocation)

expenseCategoryId.description: Reference to the ExpenseCategory for this allocation. (Relationship: ExpenseCategory 1:N BudgetAllocation)

allocatedAmountEuros.description: The amount budgeted for this category in Euros for the month.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Records an individual financial expenditure made by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made this expense. (Relationship: User 1:N Expense)

amountEuros.description: The amount of the expenditure in Euros.

expenseCategoryId.description: Reference to the category of this expense. (Relationship: ExpenseCategory 1:N Expense)

description.description: A brief description of what the expense was for.

date.description: The date and time when the expense occurred.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Manages personal tasks and reminders, including due dates and recurrence patterns.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this task. (Relationship: User 1:N Task)

title.description: The title or brief description of the task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

dueDate.description: The date when the task is due.

isCompleted.description: Indicates if the task has been completed.

priority.description: The priority level of the task (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high').

recurrenceType.description: The type of recurrence for the task (e.g., 'none', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'yearly').

recurrenceValue.description: The value for the recurrence type (e.g., 2 for 'every 2 weeks').

createdAt.description: The date and time when the task was created.

completedDate.description: The date and time when the task was completed.

originRef.description: Optional reference to an originating entity like a Plant or PantryItem if this task was generated from an alert.

HealthMetric.title: HealthMetric
HealthMetric.description: Tracks various personal health and wellness metrics over time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthMetric entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this metric. (Relationship: User 1:N HealthMetric)

date.description: The date when the health metric was recorded.

weightKg.description: The recorded body weight in kilograms.

muscleMassKg.description: The recorded muscle mass in kilograms.

hydrationLiters.description: The reported daily hydration intake in liters.

notes.description: Additional notes about the health metrics for the day.

HealthGoal.title: HealthGoal
HealthGoal.description: Defines a specific health-related objective the user aims to achieve.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthGoal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who set this health goal. (Relationship: User 1:N HealthGoal)

metricType.description: The type of health metric this goal applies to (e.g., 'weight', 'body_fat', 'muscle_mass', 'sleep', 'hydration').

targetValue.description: The target value for the chosen metric.

startDate.description: The start date of the health goal.

endDate.description: The target end date for achieving the goal.

notes.description: Additional notes about the health goal.

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., 'active', 'achieved', 'abandoned').

definition.description: Stores individual training activities for a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the activity.

params.name: activityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the activity.

definition.description: Stores overarching training plans for a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the training plan.

params.name: trainingPlanId
params.description: The unique identifier of the training plan.

definition.description: Stores individual training sessions within a specific training plan. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'trainingPlanId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the training session.

params.name: trainingPlanId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent training plan.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the training session.

params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the bike.

params.name: bikeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bike.

definition.description: Details individual components installed on a specific bike. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'bikeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: bikeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent bike.

definition.description: Logs maintenance events for bikes or components. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.description: The unique identifier of the user who recorded the maintenance.

params.name: recordId
params.description: The unique identifier of the maintenance record.

definition.description: Stores cooking recipes created or saved by a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the recipe.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the recipe.

definition.description: Links an ingredient to a specific recipe with quantity and notes. 'userId' is implicitly inherited from the parent recipe path, 'recipeId' is denormalized.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the recipe.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent recipe.

params.name: recipeIngredientId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recipe ingredient entry.

definition.description: Stores user-defined tags for categorizing items. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the tag.

params.name: tagId
params.description: The unique identifier of the tag.

definition.description: Manages user-defined ingredients. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who defined the ingredient.

params.name: ingredientId
params.description: The unique identifier of the ingredient.

definition.description: Inventories a user's cycling apparel. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the clothing item.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the clothing item.

definition.description: Stores user-defined tire pressure settings for a specific bike. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'bikeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this setup.

params.name: bikeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent bike.

params.name: setupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the tire pressure setup.

definition.description: Manages a user's indoor plants. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the plant.

params.name: plantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the plant.

definition.description: Logs actions performed on a specific plant. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'plantId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed the action.

params.name: plantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent plant.

params.name: actionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the plant action.

definition.description: Tracks items in the user's pantry. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the pantry item.

params.name: pantryItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the pantry item.

definition.description: Manages items on the user's shopping list. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the shopping list item.

params.name: shoppingListItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the shopping list item.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the expense category.

params.name: categoryId

params.name: userId

params.name: monthlyBudgetId

definition.description: Allocates budgeted amounts for specific categories within a monthly budget. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'monthlyBudgetId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this allocation.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId

params.name: allocationId

definition.description: Records individual financial expenditures. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure adheres strictly to the CORE DESIGN PRINCIPLES and DESIGN STRATEGY MANDATES, prioritizing security, scalability, and debuggability for a personal all-in-one application. The central strategy is **Path-Based Ownership** and **Structural Segregation**, nesting all user-specific data directly under a dedicated user document path: `/users/{userId}/`. This approach intrinsically links data ownership to the authenticated user's ID, simplifying security rules and ensuring strict data isolation.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** By making all collections subcollections of `/users/{userId}/`, the authorization context (`request.auth.uid`) is directly available as the `{userId}` wildcard in the path. Every document in these subcollections includes a `userId` field (e.g., `Activity.userId`, `TrainingPlan.userId`, `Bike.userId`). This denormalization means that security rules can always verify `request.auth.uid == userId` against the document's own data and the path parameter, without needing expensive and complex `get()` calls to parent documents to ascertain ownership. For deeply nested subcollections like `trainingSessions` or `components`, the immediate parent's ID (`trainingPlanId`, `bikeId`) is also denormalized into the child document. This allows atomic operations and avoids hierarchical authorization dependencies.

**Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):** All documents within any given collection (e.g., `/users/{userId}/activities`, `/users/{userId}/recipes`) share the exact same security requirements: they are owned by the `{userId}` in the path. This eliminates the need for complex conditional logic within rules to differentiate access levels for documents within the same collection, making rules simpler, more robust, and easier to debug.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** This structure naturally supports Queryable Access Patterns (QAPs). When a client queries a collection like `/users/YOUR_UID/activities`, Firestore's security rules can directly enforce that `request.auth.uid` must match `YOUR_UID`. This means that `list` operations automatically receive only the data the user is authorized to see, eliminating the possibility of accidentally querying unauthorized data or relying on client-side filtering for security. The rules explicitly grant read/write access only if `request.auth.uid` matches the `{userId}` wildcard in the path, which in turn matches the `userId` field within each document.

**Access Modeling:**
*   **Private Data:** All data is treated as private and user-owned, stored under `/users/{userId}/...`. This leverages Path-Based ownership for maximum simplicity and security.
*   **Hierarchical Paths for User-Owned Data:** Entities with `1:N` relationships to a `User` (e.g., `Activities`, `Bikes`, `Recipes`) are placed directly under the user's path. Further nested `1:N` relationships (e.g., `Components` under `Bikes`, `TrainingSessions` under `TrainingPlans`) continue this hierarchical path, maintaining clear ownership and authorization context.

**Invariants:** The `userId` field is explicitly included in every top-level user-owned document and in first-level nested subcollection documents (e.g., `TrainingSession`, `Component`). This field acts as a strong invariant, allowing security rules to verify that the `userId` in the path matches the `userId` in the document, preventing data corruption or unauthorized writes where a document might be created or moved under the wrong user's path.

This design ensures that security rules are minimal, highly declarative, and easy to audit, directly mapping to the database structure. It inherently supports future scalability for multi-user environments by providing isolated data silos for each user, with the potential to introduce shared data patterns (e.g., collaborative recipes) through additional denormalization (e.g., `members` map) if required, without breaking the core per-user isolation.
